originalTitle: Fixing Broken RL Code - Live Dev
title: Refactoring Cython Bindings for Cleaner Environment Setup in PufferLib
summary: Simplified PufferLib's Cython bindings by using direct C struct initialization, eliminating large init function signatures. Refactored breakout and pong environments to reduce boilerplate, reviewed and merged community contributions for Connect 4 and Triple Triad environments, and discussed performance optimizations for environment code.
